ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Split factor for the stock */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the stock */,
  "market_cap_on_date" REAL /* Market capitalization on the date of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on Investment */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the shares */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the position */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain or loss on the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES investment_portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, portfolio performance) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
